message:
style(tools): formatting cleanup for streaming ReadTool implementation

Linter/rustfmt pass over the streaming ReadTool code committed earlier:

- Remove trailing whitespace from comments and blank lines
- Fix function signature formatting (read_some parameter alignment)
- Simplify stop_collecting flag to direct break (remove unused variable)
- Normalize comment whitespace (trailing spaces after sentences)
- Fix indentation alignment on multi-line seek error handling
- Remove extraneous blank line before closing brace

No behavioral changes — purely formatting.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
